templates.name: 00 Portal Health Check
templates.description: Validate Semaphore runner, local repositories, and required binaries.

templates.name: 00 Health Check
templates.description: Validate runner prerequisites, patch repository, inventory, runtime path, and optional SSH batch mode.

templates.name: 01 Add Host
templates.description: Onboard hosts into the Oracle Patch inventory with dry-run and non-interactive SSH options.

templates.name: 02 Inventory
templates.description: View and validate Oracle Patch inventory rows, duplicate hosts, and app config drift.

templates.name: 03 Status
templates.description: Show latest patch phase status and resume hint for selected hosts.

templates.name: 04 Dry Run Full Pipeline
templates.description: Preview the full patch pipeline without creating locks, state, or remote changes.

templates.name: 05 Precheck
templates.description: Run patch precheck on selected hosts.

templates.name: 06 Full Patch
templates.description: Run the full patch pipeline after dry-run and precheck have been reviewed.

templates.name: 07 Resume
templates.description: Resume a failed patch pipeline using a previous run ID.

templates.name: 08 List Reports
templates.description: List recent Oracle Patch run states, summaries, and HTML report paths.

templates.name: 09 Export Report
templates.description: Copy the latest or selected Oracle Patch HTML report to /dbaportal/exports/patch-reports.

templates.name: 99 Advanced Phase
templates.description: Advanced/manual patch phase runner for execute, apply, ojvm, datapatch, postcheck, status, full, and resume.

templates.name: 00 Health Check
templates.description: Validate install framework runtime, config, tools, and local repository readiness.

templates.name: 01 Validate Config
templates.description: Validate the install and optional Data Guard deployment config.

templates.name: 02 Generate Plan
templates.description: Generate the ordered install and replication execution plan.

templates.name: 03 Precheck
templates.description: Run a fresh precheck for OS, Grid, DB, patch, and Data Guard readiness; continue through all checks for complete review.

templates.name: 04 Prepare OS
templates.description: Prepare OS packages, users, limits, kernel settings, and directories.

templates.name: 05 Verify Installer
templates.description: Verify Oracle installer media and manifest-driven patch files in /u01/sources.

templates.name: 06 Prepare Storage Rules
templates.description: Detect multipath, create /dev/asm udev rules from DM_UUID when needed, or resolve ID_SERIAL/ID_WWN/path before ASMLib labels.

templates.name: 07 Install Grid
templates.description: Install Oracle Grid Infrastructure.

templates.name: 08 Configure ASM
templates.description: Set ASM diskstring ORCL:* and create OCR/DATA/RECO diskgroups from ASMLib labels.

templates.name: 09 Install DB Software
templates.description: Install Oracle database software only.

templates.name: 10 Update OPatch
templates.description: Update OPatch in Grid and database homes.

templates.name: 11 Analyze Patch
templates.description: Analyze patch media and patch applicability before apply.

templates.name: 12 Apply Grid Patch
templates.description: Apply Grid Infrastructure patch with dry-run default.

templates.name: 13 Apply DB Patch
templates.description: Apply database home patch with dry-run default.

templates.name: 14 Apply OJVM Patch
templates.description: Apply OJVM patch with dry-run default.

templates.name: 15 Create Database
templates.description: Create the primary Oracle database.

templates.name: 16 Patch Inventory
templates.description: Collect and display Oracle patch inventory after install/patch phases.

templates.name: 17 Setup Active Data Guard
templates.description: Configure physical standby and Active Data Guard from the fresh install workflow.

templates.name: 18 Setup Broker
templates.description: Configure Data Guard Broker for the fresh install workflow.

templates.name: 19 Validate Deployment
templates.description: Validate database, listener, patch, and Data Guard deployment state.

templates.name: 20 Generate Report
templates.description: Generate the install and replication deployment report.

templates.name: 21 Full Workflow
templates.description: Run the consolidated manifest-driven install, auto ASM storage, and replication workflow from precheck through deployment validation.

templates.name: 22 Resume Workflow
templates.description: Resume the consolidated workflow using existing state; optionally start or stop at a selected phase.

templates.name: 99 Advanced Phase
templates.description: Advanced/manual runner for manifest-driven install, auto ASM storage, patch-during-install, Data Guard, report, switchover, failover, diagnostics, and rollback actions.

templates.name: 00 Health Check
templates.description: Validate replication runtime, local repository readiness, render output, and shell syntax while reporting config review warnings.

templates.name: 01 Init Config
templates.description: Create a starter Data Guard config from a supported topology profile.

templates.name: 02 Validate Config
templates.description: Validate an existing Data Guard replication config.

templates.name: 03 Setup SSH
templates.description: Bootstrap SSH access for Data Guard replication automation.

templates.name: 04 Plan
templates.description: Build the staged Data Guard replication execution plan.

templates.name: 05 Render
templates.description: Render generated scripts and files for the selected Data Guard config.

templates.name: 06 Run
templates.description: Run the staged Data Guard replication workflow with dry-run default.

templates.name: 99 Advanced Phase
templates.description: Advanced/manual runner for Data Guard config initialization, validation, SSH bootstrap, render, plan, and staged execution.
